title: Stichorkis pandaneti
taxonomy: Stichorkis pandaneti is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is native to New Guinea and is classified under the genus Stichorkis. Stichorkis pandaneti is further classified into the subfamily Orchidoideae and tribe Cranichideae. The species name pandaneti is derived from the genus Pandanus, a type of palm tree found in the region. This classification helps in understanding the plant's evolutionary history and its relationships with other species within the Orchidaceae family.

The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal disorders, due to its reported health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
